Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): Carrier base 
DME base 

VALUES: 
 00 = Unknown 
01 = Pharmacy facility or location 
where drugs and other medically 
related items and services are 
sold, dispensed, or otherwise 
provided directly to patients. 
02 = Telehealth —the location where 
health services and health related 
services are provided or received, 
through a telecommunication 
system. 
03 = School — a facility whose primary 
purpose is education.
